task.domains: (topic task) (topic hi-d) (topic ui-d) (topic sw-d) (topic indexing-d) (topic ut-d) a(base ishcondition) a(base varid) a(base varref) a(base cid) a(base partslist) (topic oce-d) (topic sdlVariables-c) (topic oceCommonElements-c) (topic oceMetaDecl-c) (topic oceTopic-c) (topic oceTopic-c task oceTask-c) (topic oceTopic-c hi-d oceHighlight-c) (topic oceTopic-c ui-d oceUi-c) (topic oceTopic-c sw-d oceSoftware-c)
task.title: How to install a used printer

abstract.p: This document gives an overview of the installation procedure of a used printer.

p.xref: Dimension and weight of the crate

entry.p: See How to unpack the printer.
Place the printer and all other parts delivered with the system on the final location.
Remove the transport locking from the printer.
See Remove the transport locking material from the printer
Install the filters or external exhaust:
Do 24 How to install the Frame filters
Do 24 How to install the exhaust
See 00 How to level the printer.
Check winder unit is still in correct position after transport no play in the halve moon is allowed. (left and right side)
The picture shows a wrong position.
In case of a wrong position, loosen the screws, the winder will re-position itself and tighten te screws again
See 19 How to adjust the winder with respect to the printer
Do 24 How to adjust the top cover door switches (24S1 and 24S5)

note.p: If you skip this step it might lead soon to a service call.

entry.p: Remove the 4 nuts (Open ended spanner 17 mm).
Keep the nuts with the other transport locking.
Fill the chiller with cooling liquid.
See 06 how to fill the V2 chiller with cooling liquid.
Install the 3 feet in the stand.
Place the stand underneath the chiller.
Lift the chiller with the stand.
See 04 How to install the printheads.
Check if the power switch in the OFF position.

li.p: the 4 caps of the ink tubes
the 4 caps of the air tubes
the 2 protection caps of the glass fiber cable

entry.p: Place the service box below the media drawer.
Mount the cover of the knife compartment.

note.p: Use protective gloves if you guide the cables underneath the printer.

entry.p: Place the 2 rollers on the winder.

section.title: Fill ink in the used system

entry.p: Check all tube connectors in the pump / Reservoir unit to prevent air in the tubes.
Start-up the printer in cold SDS.
Do SDS test 02-6-004 Estimated ink level / Mark ink jar as empty (C, M, Y, K or W) [Special Tests]. Mark the ink jars as empty.
When the green refill LEDs turn on: place the new well shaken ink bottles.
Wait at least 60 seconds after placement of the last ink bottle.
The RFID tag of the bottle needs to be successfully written.
Slide the printhead carriage to the middle of the platen (print surface).
Place a sheet of media on the platen.
Place a maintenance tray on the sheet.
Close the 8 valves of the printheads.
Disconnect the ink tube from printhead.

li.p: Guide only 1 ink tube into the maintenance tray.
Lock the tube to the maintenance tray with a clip/tape.
Open the valve of the tubs after you mounted it.

entry.p: Do SDS test 02-6-001 Fill ink tube(s) [Special Tests].

li.p: Select "Pump & color + number" and 400 seconds (Time to flush the complete volume of the ink tube).
Fill the ink tubes one by one.
Check the ink flow: After the air bubbles (due to air in the ink tube) disappeared the ink must have a constant flow for 30 seconds from the ink tube.
When there is still air left in the ink tube, you can extend the 400 seconds by pressing continue in the SDS test.
Result: tube is air free if the ink flow has a heartbeat rhythm from the pump.

entry.p: Result : tube is air free if the ink flow has a heartbeat rhythm from the pump.
In case still air is in the ink tube: squeeze the ink pump together to improve the functionality of the pump or check/lock the ink tube couplings.
Close the valve of the ink tube. (Reason: prevent air pocket in tube).
Connect the ink tube to the printhead.
Continue with the next ink tube (at step 13) until all 4 tubes are done.
Open the all valves of ink tube.
Remove the maintenance tray from the sheet.
Remove the sheet from the platen.
Clean the maintenance station / wiper and clean wall.
Replace the waste tray and reset the counter via the wizard in the user interface.
In case of 25xxxx errors please execute test 04-6-020 Mark printhead(s) as empty.
See 04-6-020 Mark printhead(s) as empty [Special Tests]
Insert the SAM key and start SDS
Set the filters or external exhaust configuration:
Do 24-1-001 Type of air filtering [Parameters]. Set the correct configuration (Default: Filters available).

li.p: Start manual maintenance on the operator panel.
Perform the listed actions:
Clean the maintenance station, wiper and clean wall.
Clean the matrix plate and black protection cover.
Clean the platen.
The printer performs a purge and wipe to clean the nozzles.
Do not: Print a nozzle classification chart to automatically optimize the
nozzles.
Measure the media thickness of the installation media by means of a caliper.
See 12 How to measure the media thickness.
Examples: MPI2000 = 265 µm, IJM613 = 145 µm.

p.b: Use SDS test: 25-1-004 Vinyl, 2501-005 Film or 25-1-006 Paper and fill in the measured media thickness.

li.p: Load installation media (e.g. MPI2000 or IJM613) on roll position 1.
Select in the UI one of the media profiles that begin with ‘Service tests’:
Service tests – Vinyl (e.g. for MPI2000) or
Service tests – Paper (e.g. for IJM613) or
Service tests – Film.
Type the correct media width.
Start SDS.
Execute SDS 21-6-002 ‘Select required printer calibrations’ and select:
Media transport calibration
M&C scanner calibration
Carriage Y calibration.
Printhead nozzle optimization

note.p: Note: This test will set/reset some parameters for the next SDS tests.

li.p: Execute SDS 04-6-026 ‘Execute printhead calibrations’
Select Roll1.
If no error / warning occurred during calibration, proceed. Otherwise continue to solve the error.
Execute SDS 21-6-003 ‘Execute selected printer calibrations’
Select Roll 1
If no error / warning occurred during calibration, proceed. Otherwise continue to solve the error.
Exit SDS.
Do the Media calibration from the UI.
Do the Automatic maintenance and select the Automatic nozzle optimization.
Start SDS.
Execute SDS 21-6-004 ‘PQT in High Quality mode (4_pass)’
Select Roll 1
Judge the Print Quality (PQ) according to the TSM.

note.p: In case of Print Quality / Calibration issues: Check SDS test 04-6-002

li.p: Exit SDS.
Remove the installation media from the printer.

entry.p: Check the winding, cutting and print quality of the system.
See Install the media output lower cover
Mount all covers on the printer.

li.p: Do How to install the Colorado printer driver in ONYX

entry.p: Do Print the ONYX test print
Ask the customer to create a shortcut to the Settings editor on a customers PC.
Access the Settings editor via any web browser, by typing in the printer's:

li.p: IP address
or
Hostname

entry.p: Use the link to create a shortcut on the desktop.
See How to set up On Remote Service (ORS)
Set-up the TSM with a USB key or ORS.
See Install the HTML TSM from a USB key
See Install the embedded HTML TSM
Optional: Standard HTML TSM is already installed.
Carry out the Quick Start instruction.

note.p: For Germany only: Hand over the hard copy of the safety manual.

entry.p: Create and Save the installation visit in ADAM.
Store the transport packing material, blisters, foam blocks and the media of calibration at the customers place.
